category_sources: source_facts.description says cross-platform network traffic monitor; official Sniffnet README says it monitors Internet traffic.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and GitHub README use the name Sniffnet.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to the project Wiki; official homepage is source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/GyulyVGC/sniffnet, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe a cross-platform application for monitoring Internet/network traffic.
